issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnAttack' not 'Activated'. Card text says '[When Attacking]' which is an attack trigger.
Condition should check for a Character with cost 8 or more on your board. Current condition only checks for resting DON. Should use 'HasCardOnBoard' with cost constraint.
Target action missing 'maxCount' constraint. Card says 'up to 1' opponent Character, but target only specifies maxCost. Should include 'maxCount':1 to enforce 'up to 1' selection.
